title: University of Southampton Delhi Academic and Professional Team Overview
text: Meet our team. Our academic and professional team members combine local knowledge of Higher Education in India with a wider perspective built on years of international experience. University staff profiles: Read more about our senior leadership, academic faculty members and professional staff. Choose to search or filter by their department or research interests (for academic faculty members) to find the correct person. Department: All Departments, Accounting and Finance academics, Business academics, Computing academics, Economics academics, Professional staff, Senior leadership. Research Interest: All Research Interests, Advanced Threat Detection & Response, Agricultural Economics, AI for social good, Behavioural Finance, Biomedical signal acquisition, processing, and analysis (EEG and related modalities), Board gender diversity, Board of directors, Brain–computer interfaces (BCIs) for assistive technologies, Career Management & Sustainable Careers, Convergence and growth dynamics in emerging economies, Corporate finance, Corporate governance, Cyber Threat intelligence, Deep learning, neural networks, and quantum-inspired computational models, Detection for speech disfluency and communication disorders, Digital health, Diversity, Equality & Inclusion, Environment Economics, ESG finance and sustainable investing, Ethical data science, Ethical Decision Making, Financial inclusion, Financial market complexity and behavioural dynamics, Financial Reporting, Financial wellbeing & Financial capability, Flexible Work, Gender and identity, Green computing, Human–robot interaction and adaptive intelligent systems, Inclusive, user-centred design for emerging and accessible technologies, Information Security & Privacy, Labor Economics, Leaders and Leadership Development, Malware Analysis, Nature-inspired computing, Organisational Behaviour, Promoter ownership, Responsible AI, Threat Hunting, Volatility modelling, regime-switching, and higher-order moment connectedness. Search.
summary: This section introduces the University of Southampton Delhi's academic and professional team, highlighting their blend of local and international expertise. Users can search and filter staff profiles by department or research interests.

title: Dr. Aparna Pasumarthy Profile and Research Interests
text: Dr Aparna Pasumarthy is an interdisciplinary researcher and educator, specializing in careers, leadership, and organizational behaviour. She previously taught at Queen Mary, University of London, and is an Associate Fellow of the Higher Education Academy. Her research focuses on the careers of professional men and women in India, especially within multinational corporations. Dr Pasumarthy holds PhD Business and Management from Queen Mary, University of London. She has presented her research at major international conferences and is committed to promoting social justice, inclusion, and sustainability in academia and organisational environments. Research Interests: Career Management & Sustainable Careers, Diversity, Equality & Inclusion, Ethical Decision Making, Flexible Work, Leaders and Leadership Development, Organisational Behaviour. View profile.
summary: Dr. Aparna Pasumarthy specializes in careers, leadership, and organizational behaviour, focusing on professional careers in India. She holds a PhD from Queen Mary, University of London.

title: Dr. Chitrakalpa Sen, Head of Economics
text: Dr Chitrakalpa Sen is Head of Economics at the University of Southampton Delhi. He holds a PhD in Economics from the West Bengal University of Technology, following an MSc and BSc (H) in Economics from the University of Calcutta. His research lies at the intersection of sustainable finance, ESG investing, and financial market dynamics, with particular expertise in volatility modelling, regime switching, and convergence in emerging economies. Chitrakalpa has published widely in leading international journals such as Journal of Economic Surveys, Energy Economics, Resources Policy and the Journal of Cleaner Production, and his work continues to shape debates on the resilience of green investments and the role of financial markets in sustainable growth. Research Interests: Convergence and growth dynamics in emerging economies, ESG finance and sustainable investing, Financial market complexity and behavioural dynamics, Volatility modelling, regime-switching, and higher-order moment connectedness. View profile.
summary: Dr. Chitrakalpa Sen, Head of Economics at UoSD, researches sustainable finance, ESG investing, and financial market dynamics. He holds a PhD in Economics and has published in major international journals.

title: Dr. Mohammed Anam Akhtar, Head of Business Education
text: Dr Mohammed Anam Akhtar, currently working as Head of Business Education at University of Southampton Delhi, brings over a decade of distinguished academic, leadership, and industry experience to the role. He has previously served as Assistant Professor of Accounting and Finance and BBA program chair at IMT Dubai, contributed to ACCA program accreditation, and held teaching and consultancy positions at Curtin University (Dubai). Dr Akhtar holds a PhD in Management from NIT India, is a Certified Management and Business Educator (CMBE, UK), and is UGC-NET qualified. His wide-ranging expertise ensures academic rigour and innovation in business programs at the University, enriching the student experience with world-class learning and strong industry engagement. Research Interests: Behavioural Finance, Financial inclusion, Financial Reporting, Financial wellbeing & Financial capability. View profile.
summary: Dr. Mohammed Anam Akhtar is the Head of Business Education at UoSD, with over a decade of academic and industry experience. He holds a PhD in Management and focuses on business program innovation and industry engagement.

title: Dr. Nalini Sharan, Student Experience Lead
text: Dr Nalini Sharan leads the Student Experience portfolio at University of Southampton Delhi, bringing nearly two decades of leadership in higher education, student affairs, and strategic engagement. She is responsible for shaping a student-first culture that fosters wellbeing, inclusion, global awareness, and a vibrant campus life. View profile.
summary: Dr. Nalini Sharan, with nearly two decades of experience, leads Student Experience at UoSD, focusing on student wellbeing, inclusion, and a vibrant campus life.

title: Dr. Nitish Gupta, Head of Business (Knowledge Exchange & Enterprise)
text: Dr Nitish Gupta joined University of Southampton Delhi in August 2025 as Head of Business (Knowledge Exchange & Enterprise) and as a Lecturer in Business. He brings a proven track record in research, teaching, product innovation leadership and digital transformation to the campus. View profile.
summary: Dr. Nitish Gupta joined UoSD in August 2025 as Head of Business (Knowledge Exchange & Enterprise) and Lecturer. He specializes in research, teaching, product innovation, and digital transformation.

title: Dr. Rajesh Yadav, Lecturer and Senior Tutor in Cybersecurity
text: Dr Rajesh Yadav is a seasoned educator with over 20 years of experience in creating innovative and engaging learning environments. Specializing in Cybersecurity, Cyber Threat Intelligence, Digital Forensics, Malware Analysis, Threat Detection, and Ethical Hacking, he combines hands-on experiential teaching with curriculum design to enhance critical thinking and problem-solving skills. He holds a BE, MTech, and PhD in Computer Science and Engineering and has contributed to both national and international academic institutions. He serves as a Lecturer and Senior Tutor at the University of Southampton Delhi, having previously held diverse academic roles across multiple institutions. Dr Yadav’s teaching excellence and contributions to the cybersecurity domain have been recognized with the Excellence in Teaching Award from the University of Southampton Malaysia and the International Educational Achievements Award for his outstanding contributions to the Cybersecurity domain. Research Interests: Advanced Threat Detection & Response, Cyber Threat intelligence, Information Security & Privacy, Malware Analysis, Threat Hunting. View profile.
summary: Dr. Rajesh Yadav is a Lecturer and Senior Tutor at UoSD, specializing in Cybersecurity with over 20 years of experience. He holds a PhD in Computer Science and Engineering and has received multiple teaching awards.
entities: BE in Computer Science and Engineering
MTech in Computer Science and Engineering
PhD in Computer Science and Engineering

title: How to Meet the University of Southampton Delhi Team
text: You might also want to know: How can I meet your team? You can meet us online, and in a selection of major cities in India. You can see when and where, by visiting the Events area of our website. When event tickets are available, you will be able to book a physical event, or to register for an online session, from the event page. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page. No results found.
summary: Prospective students can meet the University of Southampton Delhi team online or in major Indian cities. Event pages provide details for booking physical events, online sessions, or campus tours.
